title: The AIF-C01 Exam: Format, Domains, and the AWS AI Landscape
description: How the exam is structured, what the five domains weigh, and a map of the AWS AI and ML services you'll be tested on.

lessons.title: Exam Format and Scoring
objectives: Describe the exam's question count, time limit, and cost
Recognise all four question types, including ordering and matching
State the passing score and how compensatory scoring works

lessons.title: The Five Domains and Their Weighting
objectives: Name the five exam domains and their weightings
See why generative AI and foundation models dominate the exam
Prioritise study time by domain weight

lessons.title: The AWS AI and ML Service Landscape
objectives: Place AWS AI offerings into three layers: AI services, Bedrock, and SageMaker
Say what Amazon Bedrock, SageMaker, and Amazon Q are each for
Choose a pre-trained AI service over custom ML when it fits
